faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about studying abroad

items.q: What services does Pioneer Global Edu offer?
items.a: We offer comprehensive study abroad services including student counseling, university selection, admission processing, visa guidance, scholarship assistance, accommodation support, and pre-departure guidance.

items.q: How long does the application process take?
items.a: The timeline varies by country and university, but typically ranges from 3 to 9 months. We recommend starting the process at least 8-12 months before your intended intake.

items.q: What are the eligibility requirements for studying abroad?
items.a: Eligibility requirements vary by country and university. Generally, you need a strong academic record, English language proficiency (IELTS/TOEFL), and sufficient financial resources.

items.q: How much does it cost to study abroad?
items.a: Costs vary significantly by country, university, and program. Tuition fees can range from $5,000 to $50,000+ per year. Living expenses also vary by location.

items.q: Can you help with scholarship applications?
items.a: Yes, we provide comprehensive scholarship assistance including identifying suitable scholarships, preparing applications, and meeting deadlines.

items.q: What is your visa success rate?
items.a: Our visa success rate is 98%, well above the industry average. Our experienced visa consultants ensure all documentation is complete and accurate.
Yes, we offer pre-departure guidance and can coordinate with our partners abroad for airport pickup, accommodation, and orientation support.
Simply fill out our consultation form or contact us directly. We will schedule a free counseling session to understand your goals.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Study Abroad Journey?

about.title: About Pioneer Global Edu
about.subtitle: We are passionate about transforming lives through international education
about.story1: Founded in 2010, Pioneer Global Edu started with a simple mission: to make quality international education accessible to students worldwide. What began as a small counseling office has grown into a premier education consultancy serving thousands of students annually.
about.story2: Over the past 15 years, we have helped over 10,000 students gain admission to their dream universities across 50+ countries. Our success is built on personalized guidance, expert knowledge, and unwavering commitment to each student's unique journey.
about.missionText: To empower students with the knowledge, guidance, and support they need to successfully navigate the complex process of studying abroad.
about.visionText: To be the world's most trusted education consultancy, creating a global community of educated, empowered individuals.
